steps.title: Find the plural antecedent
steps.content: The sentence says "the artworks" brought visual texture to the airport terminals. The blank refers back to those artworks as the subject of "debuted in January 1983."

steps.title: Match pronoun number
steps.content: Choice A, choice C, and choice D are singular pronouns, so they do not agree with plural "artworks." The remaining pronoun is plural and correctly completes the dependent clause: "When they debuted in January 1983." The answer is B.
